query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ',', 1), ' - ', 1) as logradouro
FROM establishments 
WHERE address REGEXP 'Lidio|Ovidio|Valerio|Silverio|Honorio|Pedroso|Custodio|Eusebio|Januario|Hilario|Teodoro|Lazaro|Cesario|Genaro|Nazario|Rosario'
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT DISTINCT 
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ',', 1), ' - ', 1) as logradouro
FROM establishments 
WHERE address REGEXP 'Lidio|Ovidio|Valerio|Silverio|Honorio|Pedroso|Custodio|Eusebio|Januario|Hilario|Teodoro|Lazaro|Cesario|Genaro|Nazario|Rosario'
LIMIT 20;
